# Financial Model — MakinMoves Trinity Strategy
**Generated by:** Grounded (CFO agents)
**Date:** 2026-03-29 (6:42 PM)
**Status:** Preliminary (pending COO launch timeline + CTMO cost baseline)

---

## Three-Stream Revenue Forecast (CEO Approved Strategy)

**Source:** Decision: Q1-PRIORITY-STREAMS (CEO, 2026-03-29 16:35)

Based on CEO's approved prioritization: Digital Products (Notion + Canva, Gumroad) + Print-on-Demand (Redbubble stickers) + Affiliate Marketing (AI Tools, WordPress)

### Early Milestones (First 3 Weeks)

**By March 31 (Setup Complete):**
- Digital Products: 1+ template live (Gumroad)
- PoD: 5+ designs live (Redbubble)
- Affiliate: 3+ articles published (WordPress)
- Status: Autonomous operation ready

**By April 4 (Week 1 Revenue):** *Target $70+*
- Digital: 0–2 sales ($25–50 revenue)
- PoD: 1–3 sales ($20–50 revenue, Redbubble 40% commission)
- Affiliate: Early traffic, $0–5 (too early for clicks)
- **Expected: $40–70**

**By April 18 (Week 3 Revenue):** *Target $350+ cumulative*
- Digital: 3–5 sales cumulative ($75–200)
- PoD: 8–15 sales cumulative ($100–150, Redbubble)
- Affiliate: First clicks, $0–50 (4-6 weeks to revenue)
- **Expected cumulative: $200–350+**

### Month 1+ Projections (April onwards, if growth accelerates)

| Stream | Unit Economics | April | May | June | Notes |
|--------|-----------------|-------|-----|------|-------|
| **Digital Products** | $25–45/sale (Notion), avg $30 | $75–200 | $200–500 | $400–800 | Early validation, expand templates |
| **PoD (Redbubble)** | $15–25/sale (40% net), avg $20 | $100–150 | $200–400 | $400–700 | Passive, viral upside potential |
| **Affiliate** | $0.50–5/click, 30-50% commission | $0–50 | $100–300 | $300–500 | Builds 4-8 weeks, accelerates after |
| **TOTAL CUMULATIVE** | — | $200–350 | $500–1,200 | $1,100–2,000 |

## Cost Structure

### Fixed Monthly Costs
| Item | Estimated | Notes |
|------|-----------|-------|
| Hosting (Gumroad, WordPress, etc.) | $25 | Gumroad 10% commission handled separately |
| Email/automation platform | $15 | Mailchimp/ConvertKit free tier or low-cost |
| Domain (optional, amortized) | $1 | Negligible |
| **TOTAL FIXED** | **$41/mo** | — |

### Variable Costs (by stream)
| Stream | Cost % | Notes |
|--------|--------|-------|
| **Digital Products** | 10% (Gumroad commission) | Platform handles payment processing |
| **Freelance Writing** | 2% (PayPal/Stripe fees) | Minimal overhead, platform agnostic |
| **Affiliate** | 0% | Revenue share already deducted by platform |

### Example Month 1 (Conservative Scenario: $600 revenue)
| Item | Amount |
|------|--------|
| **Digital Products Revenue** | $200 |
| — Gumroad Commission (10%) | -$20 |
| — Net Digital Products | $180 |
| **Freelance Writing Revenue** | $300 |
| — Payment Fees (2%) | -$6 |
| — Net Writing | $294 |
| **Affiliate Revenue** | $100 |
| — Commission (already net) | $0 |
| — Net Affiliate | $100 |
| **Gross Stream Revenue (NET)** | $574 |
| **Fixed Costs** | -$41 |
| **NET PROFIT MONTH 1** | **$533** |

## Recovery Timeline (CEO Approved Roadmap)

**Target:** $10,000 cumulative revenue by Q2-Q3 2026 (CEO approved)
**Current seed budget:** $1,000
**Monthly burn (fixed costs):** ~$41/mo

### Revenue Ramp by Milestone (CEO Targets)

| Checkpoint | Date | Cumulative Revenue | Status | Notes |
|------------|------|-------------------|--------|-------|
| **Setup Checkpoint** | March 31 | $0–5 | On track | Systems autonomous, first content live |
| **Week 1 Milestone** | April 4 | **$40–70** | Target | Digital + PoD early sales |
| **Week 3 Milestone** | April 18 | **$200–350** | Target | All streams generating, affiliate early traffic |
| **Month 2 (May)** | May 4 | $500–1,200 | Projected | Growth accelerates, affiliate builds |
| **Month 3 (June)** | June 4 | $1,100–2,000 | Projected | Multiple streams compounding |
| **Month 4 (July)** | July 4 | $2,500–4,500 | Projected | Affiliate revenue kicks in harder |
| **Target: $10k** | **Late July–Early August** | **$10,000+** | **On track** | **~4–5 months from launch** |

**Conclusion:** Revenue recovery to $10k is achievable by **late July 2026** if all three streams execute to targets. This assumes:
- Digital Products maintains $200–400/month velocity
- PoD maintains $100–300/month velocity (passive)
- Affiliate builds 4-8 weeks, then adds $300–500+/month

**Risk:** If any stream underperforms, timeline extends 2–4 weeks. If all overperform, recovery could be June-July.

## Financial Recommendations (CFO Analysis of CEO Approved Strategy)

**✅ CEO Decision Approved:** Digital → PoD → Affiliate (parallel setup by March 30)

1. **Seed Budget Allocation ($1,000):**
   - 40% → Digital Products (Gumroad setup, Canva subscription, design assets): $400
   - 35% → PoD + Affiliate (WordPress hosting 6 mo, Redbubble tools, article writing): $350
   - 15% → Automation & monitoring (n8n, PostgreSQL, tracking dashboards): $150
   - 10% → Contingency reserve: $100

2. **Revenue Tracking & Success Metrics:**
   - **April 4 checkpoint:** Must hit $40–70 (Digital + PoD early sales)
   - **April 18 checkpoint:** Must hit $200–350 cumulative
   - **Daily escalation:** If any stream misses daily targets, escalate to CEO/COO
   - **Real-time tracking:** Every transaction in PostgreSQL, no batching

3. **Operational Discipline:**
   - Post-launch: 30-min financial standups with CEO/COO/CTMO
   - Weekly financial report every Monday (revenue, costs, recovery progress)
   - Monthly adjustment if growth rate < 50% of forecast
   - Contingency: If Digital < $20 by April 4, pivot to PoD focus
